options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage <file> # Specifies the powermeter include file which contains powermeter options

options.name: -block
options.description: Specifies master cell name for the powermeter include file which contains powermeter options to be applied

options.name: -reset
options.description: Specifies to reset and ignore all the previous powermeter include files.
